mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Report ( reporter_id, target_type, target_id, target_user_id, report_title, report_content, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{reporterId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetUserId}, #{reportTitle}, #{reportContent}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT report_no AS reportNo, reporter_id AS reporterId, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId, target_user_id AS targetUserId, report_title AS reportTitle, report_content AS reportContent, answer_status AS answerStatus, action_status AS actionStatus, reg_date AS regDate FROM Report WHERE reporter_id = #{reporterId} ORDER BY reg_date DESC
